title: Cradlepoint NCM Alert
description: A generated alert in NetCloud Manager. Mirrors the payload pushed to alert_push_destinations and the response returned from /api/v2/alerts/.

type.description: Alert type identifier, e.g. router_offline, signal_degraded, config_changed, subscription_expiring, threshold_breach.

details.description: Free-form contextual payload (signal samples, config diff, threshold values).
